turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there, I’m calling to cancel an appointment I have scheduled.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Of course. Could you please share the date and time of the appointment you want to cancel, so I can assist you further?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: First, would you like to create a demo patient profile?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name to get started.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July 4, 2000 for demo purposes.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my date of birth is March 14, 1992. I’m calling to cancel my upcoming appointment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You have an appointment with Dr. Zigney-Lukosky on Tuesday, June 30th.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, that's the one. I'd like to cancel that appointment, please.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is this the appointment you want to cancel?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I just don’t need it anymore, that’s all.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Can you share the reason for cancelling your appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment on June 30th with Dr. Zygmunt Julekowski has been cancelled.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No, that’s all I needed. Thanks again. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Goodbye! Take care.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Take care.
